title: The Only Way to Do Great Work Is to Love What You Do.
short_teaser: Meaningful work often begins with caring deeply about what you create.
story: Steve Jobs often emphasized the connection between passion and excellence. His belief was that people create their best work when they feel connected to the purpose behind it.
impact: Passion does not mean every day is easy. It means the work matters enough to continue.
spark_application: What part of your work feels most meaningful?
